message:
fix(monitor,notifications,cli): design-level hardening from deep audit

- Notification throttling: min 60s between sends, Red/Critical bypass
- Atomic config write in install.rs via temp file + rename
- CLI provision/replenish: free-space safety check via FsStatsCollector
- PID derivative low-pass filter (alpha=0.3) to suppress noise spikes
- EWMA acceleration: smoothed rate delta instead of raw instantaneous

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
